channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran shoots down US fighter jet, one pilot rescued, media say
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Second US fighter jet downed in Persian Gulf, Iranian media claims
- Iran’s military claims shooting down second US jet while hunt for crew of downed F-15 aircraft continues
- US fighter jet shot down over Iran, search underway for crew member, US officials say
- Iran’s military claims shooting down second US jet as hunt for crew of downed F-15 aircraft continues
- Iran Shoots Down U.S. Fighter Jet, Setting Off American Search and Rescue
- US fighter jet shot down over Iran
- Second US combat plane targeted by Iran crashes near Strait of Hormuz: Report
- Iran Shoots Down U.S. Fighter Jet, Setting Off American Search and Rescue
- Iran downs US fighter jet, raising stakes in war
- Second US combat plane targeted by Iran crashes near Strait of Hormuz: Report
- 2nd US Air Force combat plane crashes in Persian Gulf region: Report
- Second US jet crashes in Persian Gulf region in 24 hours — newspaper
- Second US plane crashes in Gulf after F-15 downed, NYT says
- Second US Air Force plane crashed in Persian Gulf region, New York Times reports
- One US crew member rescued after fighter jet downed over Iran, Israeli media say
- Second US Air Force plane crashed in Persian Gulf region, report says
- One crew member rescued after US fighter jet downed over Iran, US media report

- One US pilot rescued, another missing after Iran says it downed fighter jet

- 1 rescued after U.S. fighter jet downed in Iran, search continues
- US fighter jet downed over Iran likely conducted strikes on ground targets — media

- Iran shoots down US fighter jet as US searches for crew, new strikes on oil infrastructure (PHOTOS, VIDEOS)
- Iran war: US fighter jet reportedly shot down over Iran
- US fighter jet shot down by Iran: Report
- U.S. fighter jet shot down over Iran; Tehran urges civilians to hunt for crew
- US fighter jet shot down by Iran: Report
- Iran media says army searching for downed US fighter jet pilot
- US fighter jet shot down over Iran, search underway for crew, US officials say
- US Air Force fighter jet downed in Iran was F-15E — media
- Media say army searching for pilot of US fighter jet allegedly downed over Iran
- U.S. Fighter Jet Shot Down Over Iran, Massive Search And Rescue Operation Underway
- US fighter jet shot down over Iran, search underway for crew, US official says
- Iran media releases images claiming downed US jet
- US F-15E jet confirmed shot down over Iran as Tehran releases wreckage images
- US fighter jet downed, Iranian media reports
- Iran-U.S. War: Second American F-35 fighter jet shot down over central parts of country, claims Tehran
- Iran Claims It Shot Down US Fighter Jet, Pilot’s Fate Unknown
- Another US F-35 fighter jet downed, claims Iran; raises fears around pilot's fate as reports say captured or dead
- Iran says it shot down second US F-35 jet over Tehran
- Iran outlet publishes images of downed US jet over central Iran
- Iran claims second US fighter jet downed over central Iran
- Iran claims second US F-35 fighter jet shot down
- Iran reports shooting down US F-35 fighter jet
- Iran says second US F-35 downed over central Iran
- Iran claims shooting down second US F-35 fighter jet]]>
